message:
test: prove CTE support works end-to-end (5 integration tests)

- CTE inlines filters into main query (eng filter → 3 rows)
- CTE + additional WHERE in main query (eng + age>28 → Alice, Eve)
- CTE + aggregation (count eng → 3)
- CTE + ORDER BY + LIMIT (top 2 eng salaries → Eve, Alice)
- CTE descriptor resolves to underlying table name

Also moved CTE inlining from buildSqlDataFrame into compileFull so
both compile() and buildSqlDataFrame benefit.
